prompt:
hey can you add this paper to the datahub registry? https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.00752

Don't actually try to open a PR — just produce the record JSON.
assertions: record.json exists and parses as valid JSON
Output is a single object (not an array, not nested under 'record')
Contains all 13 long-key fields: id, task, model, ai_system, architecture, domain, language, source_url, organization, params, year, license, description
Contains no short-key aliases (arch, lang, desc, institution, url, aiSys)
id is the integer 16 (next after the 15 existing records)
ai_system value is one of: model, workflow, agent
year is an integer (no quotes), value 2023 or 2024 for Mamba
description is a non-empty string between 80 and 600 characters
language equals 'Python' (default for ML reference implementations)
